EXPLANATION: The cited work corresponds to the "CSpred" protein chemical shift prediction tool maintained by the THGLab. The authors listed in the citation represent the researchers associated with the lab or development of this tool, and the reference is a legitimate software/project citation.

LINK: https://github.com/THGLab/CSpred
FOUND_TITLE: CSpred: Protein chemical shift prediction using transfer learning and machine learning
FOUND_AUTHORS: THGLab
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
